name: reviewer
description: Layered code review framework with extensible core reviews, parallel orchestration, and project-local customization

interface.shortDescription: Extensible review workflows for code, skills, patterns, and docs.
interface.longDescription: Provides layered review orchestration, reusable review types, and project-local customization for structured repository review.
defaultPrompt: Review the current diff for logic, patterns, and docs.
Run a self-review of these changes against main.
Help me add a custom review type for this project.
